### Security Override Dependencies

These packages are force-resolved via npm overrides to fix security vulnerabilities:

| Package | Version | License |
|---------|---------|---------|
| brace-expansion | ^2.0.1 | MIT |
| uuid | ^11.1.1 | MIT |
| yaml | ^2.8.3 | ISC |
